FFlagRenderHighlightManagerPrepare6_Stag.purpose: Enhances visual feedback for players by making highlighted objects more noticeable.

FFlagAXUpdateResultsListFunctionalWrappe.mechanism: Updates how search results are processed and displayed.

DFFlagQueryClassNameExact.purpose: Increases the accuracy of class name searches, making it easier for developers to find what they need.

FFlagSlimControllerTelemetry2_Staged.purpose: Helps enhance the gaming experience by optimizing controller support.
